signature_wines.name: Clos Mogador
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Dark cherry, wild garrigue, and iron-tinged mineral slate from llicorella soils. Full-bodied with firm tannins and a long finish. Old-vine Garnacha dominates a field blend on 18 hectares of steep terraces in Gratallops.

signature_wines.name: L'Ermita
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Gran Vinya Classificada from a single hectare of century-old Garnacha on near-vertical llicorella terraces at 640 metres in Bellmunt del Priorat. Dark cherry, mineral schist, lavender, and graphite; structured for decades of ageing.

signature_wines.name: Clos Martinet
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Garnacha-dominant five-variety blend from old vines in Falset, first produced in 1989 by Josep Lluis Perez of the Cinc Pioners. Dense and herbal with ripe black cherry, thyme, mineral slate, and tobacco. Long ageing potential.

signature_wines.name: Clos de l'Obac
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The estate wine from Carles Pastrana's Costers del Siurana, one of the original Cinc Pioners. Garnacha-dominant with dark cherry, garrigue herbs, mineral slate, and cedar. Aged 14 months in French oak.

signature_wines.name: Clos Erasmus
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Garnacha-dominant wine from Daphne Glorian's tiny estate in Gratallops, first made in 1994. Ripe black cherry, floral violet, mineral slate, and dark chocolate. Rich and concentrated with a very long finish. Biodynamic farming.

signature_wines.name: Finca Dofí
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Alvaro Palacios's second-tier Priorat from a specific finca in Gratallops. Garnacha and Carinena on llicorella slate, aged in French oak. Dark fruit, mineral depth, and garrigue structure at a tier below L'Ermita.

signature_wines.name: Mas Doix Cariñena Centenaria
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Pure Carinena from a single block of vines planted in 1902 at the Mas Doix estate. Extremely old vine age transforms Carinena's high natural tannin and acidity into graphite mineral depth, violet, blueberry, and a very long finish.

signature_wines.name: Mas de la Rosa
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The prestige single-vineyard wine from Vall Llach in Porrera, sourced from old Carinena and Garnacha on the Mas de la Rosa estate acquired in 1998. Dark cherry, blackberry, iron mineral, and graphite. Aged 18-24 months in new French oak.

signature_wines.name: Les Manyes
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Vinya Classificada old-vine Garnacha from Dominik Huber's Demeter-certified biodynamic estate. Whole-cluster fermentation and ageing in large old French foudres produces a translucent, mineral style: red cherry, dried rose, slate, and fresh herb rather than the region's typical density.

signature_wines.name: Ferrer Bobet Selecció Especial
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Produced only in outstanding vintages from the oldest parcels at Ferrer Bobet. Higher proportion of new oak and lower yields deliver concentrated dark berry, graphite mineral, licorice, and cedar. A more structured and age-worthy expression than the estate's base wine.

signature_wines.name: Scala Dei Masdéu
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Single-vineyard pure Garnacha from the Masdeu plot associated with Priorat's historic Carthusian monastery at Scala Dei. Aged 22 months in new French oak. Ripe Garnacha berry, dried fig, iron mineral, and exotic spice with a very long finish.

signature_wines.name: Camins del Priorat
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Entry-level DOQ Priorat from Alvaro Palacios. Garnacha-forward with red cherry, dried herbs, and the region's mineral character. Aged briefly in stainless steel and used oak. Approachable and drink-young, it offers genuine Priorat character at an accessible price point.
